name: Remgardi steel shield

name: Eckhart's notebook
description: Various theories, descriptions, and observations made by Eckhart regarding the poisoned land. The most striking text reads:  "It seems to me that the most likely theory is a curse from the battle. I have seen land be cursed by undead before, but never to such an extent. No undead have risen in the aftermath of the battle, nor have I seen any during my exploration. I thought the monsters from the Doughe's story could not possibly be true, but I found one. It is not something a summoner or even a dozen of them could create. Not such horrible creatures at that."
